Log:
  devel/p4: fix the build with alternate OpenSSL implementations

  When setting DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=anything, p4 needs to use OPENSSLINC.

  PR:		236548
  Reported by:	Tassilo Philipp <tphilipp@potion-studios.com>
  MFH:		2019Q1
